faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students get jobs in medical colleges or industry. The highest package is 10 lakh, and the minimum is 7 lakh per annum. review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, there are very good Wi-Fi facilities and a good lab for practicals. There is also a good library for study. reviews_list.review_title: Average college, but no placement occurred during my session. Faculty are not good.

review_content.Placements: During my course, 61 students were placed. There is no package offered at my college. During my course, no companies were there, and none of the students got internships in any company. No roles are offered in my course. Top Companies are there, but for other branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: Average infrastructure for the courses at my college. And the facilities that are provided are also average; Wi-Fi is present in my college but not for students. Classrooms are like average old models with whiteboards. The hostel and canteen are not present.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of faculty and teacher, but good for playing sports and library is also good.

Top recruitment comapies are sunpharma, eicher, etc. Previous batches told that they do not placement manage the course properly. The faculty staff doesn't think about the student's future they just want money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is average, but the ground of college is very big and has volley ball court in the ground. There is no hostel in college, but nearby places offer some rooms for students and also there is no canteen in college.

overview_faqs.answer: Urmila College of Pharmacy is a reputed institute for B.Pharma, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. review_summary.college_name: Urmila College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Urmila College of Pharmacy is a good private college.

content.Placements: 60% of students get jobs in medical colleges or industry. The highest package is 10 lakh, and the minimum is 7 lakh per annum. Shilpa, Apollo, and KJMU are top recruiting companies in my college. Out of 60 students, 40 get placements in medical colleges and hospitals. In my course, the goal is to become a pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, there are very good Wi-Fi facilities and a good lab for practicals. There is also a good library for study. The quality of medical facilities is good, and we have sports facilities and games. In sports, there is cricket, football, tennis ball, and many other outdoor activities in my college.

individual_reviews.title: Average college, but no placement occurred during my session. Faculty are not good.

content.Placements: During my course, 61 students were placed. There is no package offered at my college. During my course, no companies were there, and none of the students got internships in any company. No roles are offered in my course. Top Companies are there, but for other branches.
content.Infrastructure: Average infrastructure for the courses at my college. And the facilities that are provided are also average; Wi-Fi is present in my college but not for students. Classrooms are like average old models with whiteboards. The hostel and canteen are not present.

individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of faculty and teacher, but good for playing sports and library is also good.

content.Placements: Placement percentage of students is low because the college is in village area. Top recruitment comapies are sunpharma, eicher, etc. Previous batches told that they do not placement manage the course properly. The faculty staff doesn't think about the student's future they just want money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is average, but the ground of college is very big and has volley ball court in the ground. There is no hostel in college, but nearby places offer some rooms for students and also there is no canteen in college.
